errors.emailInUse: This network identifier is already registered. Please sign in instead.
errors.invalidCredential: Incorrect credentials provided. Please verify and try again.
errors.userNotFound: No account found matching this identifier.
errors.wrongPassword: The provided password does not match our records.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid network identifier (email).
errors.weakPassword: Security requirement: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.default: Network error during authentication. Please retry.
errors.requiredFields: Please provide all required security fields.
errors.passwordMismatch: Credentials mismatch: Passwords do not match.

success.recoverySent: Recovery protocol initiated. Check your inbox for instructions.
success.accountCreated: Security profile created successfully. Welcome to the pack!
